title: Root Portal
summary: Lunar landing scene with two semantic entry routes: the gold pill into Meet Joz and the brain-plus-enter portal into MAXX.

scene.title: Moon Portal Landing
meaning: The root portal is the app's orientation layer.
It gives the user a clean choice between the human proof world and the abstract brain world.
The moon environment frames the experience as a staged portal landing rather than a flat homepage.

objects.summary: Gold pill object that opens Meet Joz.
meaning: This is the human-facing proof route.
It takes the user into Joz's identity, work, credibility, and capability world.

objects.summary: Brain object representing the abstract cognitive route into MAXX.
meaning: This is the conceptual and philosophical route.
It frames MAXX as intelligence, signal, and inner-world reasoning rather than a normal page transition.

objects.summary: Visible enter trigger paired with the brain route into MAXX.
meaning: This is the explicit invitation to enter the brain world.
It works with the brain object as the concrete portal trigger for MAXX.

objects.summary: Lunar environment surrounding the root portal.
meaning: It provides atmosphere and makes the landing feel like a portal arrival.
It is contextual, not a trigger object.
